emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the The Castlecourt Hotel website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 72/100
========================================

5 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- 3 HTTP resources (mixed content)
 HIGH
--------------------
- No schema markup
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Slow hero image load
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- 8 images missing alt text
 HIGH
--------------------
- No contact form


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.detail: Assets loading over HTTP on an HTTPS page trigger browser security warnings.
issues.label: 3 HTTP resources (mixed content)
issues.check: Click the lock icon in the address bar. If it says 'Not Secure', mixed content is present.
issues.siteHint: Visitors may get browser warnings and some may leave.

issues.detail: Missing structured data helps Google display rich snippets in search results.
issues.label: No schema markup
issues.check: Search for your business on Google - do you see star ratings, hours, or FAQ entries?
issues.siteHint: Competitors with rich snippets get 3x more clicks.

issues.detail: The main banner image is over 1MB and delays page rendering.
issues.label: Slow hero image load
issues.check: Open DevTools > Network tab and reload. Note how long the largest image takes to load.
issues.siteHint: Slow first impressions increase bounce rate by 38%.

issues.detail: Alt text helps screen readers and improves image SEO.
issues.label: 8 images missing alt text
issues.check: Right-click an image and select Inspect. If alt='' or alt is missing, it's not accessible.
issues.siteHint: Google image search alone drives significant traffic to hotel sites.

issues.detail: Without a contact form, visitors must compose their own email - some won't bother.
issues.label: No contact form
issues.check: Scroll the page. Do you see a Name/Email/Message form? If only an email link, there's no form.
issues.siteHint: Contact forms typically boost inbound leads by 30-50%.
